criteria.reason: tools/axxon_mcp_videowall.py AxxonMcpVideowall exposes the 6 tools (list_walls ungated + register_wall/change_wall/set_control_data/unregister_wall gated by AXXON_VIDEOWALL_APPROVE + CONFIRM-videowall). register_wall returns cookie_present/wall_id/seq_number and never the raw cookie; cookie tracked internally in self._cookies keyed by wall_id (lines 116-127). change_wall/unregister_wall validate wall_id via cookie lookup before any stub call (133-135, 154-156); set_control_data validates non-empty wall_id (144-145). Gate runs before arg-validation, both before _stub_and_pb2. Server wiring complete in axxon_mcp_server.py: videowall param (76), conditional register (245-246), register_videowall_tools def (1521), --enable-videowall flag (2058), flag-gated instantiation (2294-2298), videowall=videowall kwarg (2340).

tools/axxon_mcp_logic_control.py adds change_config (GetConfig then overrides only passed fields, returns previous+applied, rejects empty/unknown before wire; 157-171), change_counters (exactly one of add or remove_guid, validates guid+name before wire; 173-188), counter_action (validates counter + operation enum before wire; 190-203). All three gated and in LOGIC_CONTROL_TOOL_NAMES (44-52). Registered in register_logic_control_tools (server 1505-1518, inside def at 1484).

raw/live-verify.txt is sanitized (host shown as <demo-host>, credentials redacted; secret scan for the demo host IP and plaintext credential patterns returned no matches). It substantiates reversible round-trips for all 7 closed methods: videowall register->list(2)->change(new_seq 1)->set-control(new_seq 2)->unregister->baseline(1); change_config 300->301->300 confirmed via GetConfig; change_counters add->ListCounters->counter_action START (is_active true)->remove->empty. The 5 stand-walled methods are live re-probed and blocked (BatchCompleteAlertsReview unreachable=['Server']; GlobalTracker ClearProfiles UNIMPLEMENTED, ChangeGlobalTrackerProfiles/BindGlobalTrackProfile INTERNAL, ChangeProfiles commits but stream terminates INTERNAL). No residue.
